column.text:
• Toronto Blue Jays placed RHP Max Scherzer on the 15-day injured list with back spasms, retroactive to June 14.
• Detroit Tigers transferred RHP Burch Smith to the 60-day injured list because of lingering right shoulder inflammation.
• Los Angeles Angels designated veteran first baseman Trey Mancini for assignment, removing him from the 40-man roster.
• Cincinnati Reds activated star shortstop Elly De La Cruz from the 10-day injured list, returning him to the lineup.
• Seattle Mariners activated LF Randy Arozarena from the 10-day injured list after he recovered from a hamstring strain.
• Detroit Tigers placed 2B Gleyber Torres on the 10-day injured list with a left oblique strain, retroactive to June 16.
• Cincinnati Reds sent RHP Hunter Greene on a rehab assignment to Triple-A Louisville as he works back from injury.
• Kansas City Royals placed 3B Maikel Garcia on the 10-day injured list with a strained muscle in his left hand.
• Milwaukee Brewers released veteran infielder Luis Rengifo, making the former Angel a free agent.
• Toronto Blue Jays designated RHP Hayden Juenger for assignment to clear a spot on the 40-man roster.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
